item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will hold a closed session followed by a regular meeting on December 15, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM. The meeting will take place in the City Council Chambers located at 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The council typically meets twice a month on Tuesdays at this time.

item.title: City Council Rules Subcommittee Meeting Scheduled for December 14, 2026
item.description: The City Council Rules Subcommittee will hold a meeting on December 14, 2026, from 3:00 PM to 11:59 PM at the Community Meeting Room located at 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. For more information, visit the city’s official calendar at https://www.cityofventura.ca.gov/calendar.aspx?EID=6811.

item.title: Economic Development Subcommittee Meeting Scheduled for December 10
item.description: The Economic Development Subcommittee will hold a meeting on December 10, 2026, from 3:30 PM to 4:30 PM at the Anacapa Meeting Room, located at 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. For more information, visit the city calendar at https://www.cityofventura.ca.gov/calendar.aspx?EID=6764.

item.description: The Ventura City Council will conduct a closed session followed by a regular meeting on December 8, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM. item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will convene for a closed session and regular meeting on June 2, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM at the City Council Chambers located at 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will convene for a closed session and regular meeting on May 19, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM at the City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The council typically meets twice a month on Tuesdays. The agenda for this meeting will include discussions on local development projects and community safety initiatives. For more details, visit the city’s official calendar.

item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will convene for a closed session followed by a regular meeting on May 12, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM. The meeting will take place in the City Council Chambers located at 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The council typically meets twice a month on Tuesdays.

item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will conduct a closed session followed by a regular meeting on April 28, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM. The meeting will take place in the City Council Chambers located at 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The council typically meets twice a month on Tuesdays at this time.

item.title: City Council Committee to Review Standing Committees
item.description: The City Council Committee will hold a meeting on April 21, 2026, from 3:00 PM to 11:59 PM at the Community Meeting Room, located at 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The agenda includes a review of the city council's standing committees. More information can be found at the city’s official calendar [here](https://www.cityofventura.ca.gov/calendar.aspx?EID=6813).

item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will conduct a closed session followed by a regular meeting on April 14, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM. item.title: City Council Committee to Review Standing Committees
item.description: The City Council Committee will meet on April 7, 2026, from 3:00 PM to 11:59 PM at the Community Meeting Room located at 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The agenda includes a review of the City Council's standing committees. More information can be found at the official city calendar: https://www.cityofventura.ca.gov/calendar.aspx?EID=6812.

item.title: Ventura City Council to Hold Closed Session and Regular Meeting
item.description: The Ventura City Council will convene for a closed session and regular meeting on March 24, 2026, starting at 5:00 PM. The meeting will take place at 57 Day Rd., Ventura, CA 93003. The council typically meets twice a month on Tuesdays. For more information, visit the city’s calendar at https://www.cityofventura.ca.gov/calendar.aspx?EID=6188.
